shell.subtitle: Browse public products and place orders quickly on SharkBoom Store.

catalog.title: Discover products from approved stores.
catalog.description: Explore product details, add items to your cart, and complete orders quickly through a clear, streamlined shopping flow.
catalog.emptyDescription: The storefront only shows published, active products attached to approved merchants. Create one in the management app, then refresh this page.
catalog.fallbackDescription: Freshly published and ready to order.
catalog.loadError: Unable to load the public product catalog right now.

meta.title: SharkBoom Store | Public Catalog
meta.description: Browse published products from approved merchants, add them to cart, and continue to authenticated checkout.

notices.resetCart: Your cart was reset because orders can only contain products from one store.

meta.title: SharkBoom Store | Product Details
meta.description: Inspect a published product, choose quantity, and add it to your SharkBoom cart.
meta.productDescriptionFallback: View product details and add this item to your SharkBoom cart.

empty.title: Your cart is empty.
empty.description: Add a few published products from the storefront to start the B2C order flow.

summary.title: Review your order
summary.description: The cart only keeps products from one store so the order flow stays aligned with the Task 3 merchant constraint.

auth.title: Sign in before placing the order
auth.description: The checkout API requires an authenticated customer. Use the login page, then come back here to finish the order.

checkout.title: Delivery details
checkout.descriptionSuffix: Complete the address below to create the order and auto-assign an eligible courier.

errors.checkout: Unable to place the order right now.

meta.title: SharkBoom Store | Cart and Checkout
meta.description: Review cart items, sign in as a customer, and submit delivery details to create a Task 3 order.

auth.title: Sign in to complete the Task 3 checkout flow.
auth.description: Use a customer account to place orders from the public storefront. Merchant management stays in the management app, while this page keeps the B2C buying journey clear.

stats.liveApi: Connected to auth and order services

authenticated.title: You're already signed in.
authenticated.descriptionSuffix: and go back to the cart page to finish checkout.

register.title: Create customer account
register.description: Register once, then use the same account for future orders.

meta.loginDescription: Sign in with a customer account to continue checkout on the SharkBoom storefront.
meta.registerDescription: Create a customer account to place B2C orders from the public SharkBoom storefront.
